title: W0rld's Tarot Cards
description: Adds the classic 22 Major Arcana Tarot Cards
body:
# Description
------------------------
This mod adds the 22 Major Arcana Tarot Cards to minecraft, all with difrent abilities and gimicks.
## Obtention
--------------------------
To obatin these cards, you must first make a Tarot Card Deck which will contain 7 random tarot cards inside. The recipe is shwown in the gallery.
## Current Tarot Cards and all their abilities
----------------------
- **The fool** (Active): Gives speed, jump-boost, and slow-falling
- **The Magician** (Active): Disables gravity for the user for a short time
- **The High Priestess** (Active): Allows the user to fly for a short time
- **The Empress** (Active, ONE TIME USE): Gives one new tarot cards
- **The Emperor** (Active, ONE TIME USE): Gives two new tarot cards
- **The Hierophant** (Active): Gives 1 experience level
- **The Lovers** (Active): Gives saturation
- **The Chairiot** (Active): Gives resistance
- **Strength** (Active): What do you think?
- **The Hermit** (Active): Gives invisibility
- **Wheel of Fortune** (Active): Gives either absorption, or a slow death
- **Justice** (Active): Removes all effects from the user
- **The Hanged Man** (Active): Brings the user's health down to one, but gives them haste, luck, water breathing, fire resistance, and speed
- **Death** (Passive): Slowly kills the user, but if used as a weapon, can do massive dammage to others over time
- **Temperance** (Active): Sends the user to the end with temporary flight
- **The Devil** (Active): Sends the user to the nether, but gives them resistance and fire resistance
- **The Tower** (Active): Sets the weather to thunder
- **The Star** (Active): Sends the user 100 blocks in the air
- The Moon (Passive): Disables fall dammage for the user
- **The Sun** (Active): Quickly speeds up the movment of time
- **Judgement** (Active): Casts down 5 lightning strikes on the block hit while holding the card
- **The World** (Active): Brings the user to their spawn point
### -All abilties that involve dimentional teleportation can be disabled!

## Usage
-----------------------
Yes, You can use this nod in a modpack (Just please put some kind of credit please)

Yes, You can put this mod in a video (Just please put some kind of credit please)

No, You can not Re-distribute this mod on other platforms.
